_note: Token values confirmed from Figma MCP extraction (node 2034:5802). Composite component: CalendarSimple > CalendarTitle + DayItemSimpleCalendar.

width.description: Fixed width of the calendar card.

borderRadius.description: Corner radius of the calendar card.

paddingHorizontal.description: Left and right padding inside the card.

paddingVertical.description: Top and bottom padding inside the card.

gap.description: Gap between the CalendarTitle header and the day grid.

chevronSize.description: Width and height of left and right navigation icons.

cellHeight.description: Height of each weekday label cell.

cellPadding.description: Padding inside each weekday label cell.

size.description: Width and height of each day cell.

borderRadius.description: Border radius applied to Disable and Planned day cells.

selectedBackground.description: Filled circle behind the selected day number. 36×36px, centered within the 40px cell.
selectedBackground.colorToken: TODO: Confirm the design token for the selected day background color.

indicator.description: Small dot indicator shown on Planned days. Centered below the date number.
indicator.colorToken: TODO: Confirm the design token for the planned day indicator dot color.

--day-item/text-default.description: Day number color for Available (No-plan and Planned) days.

--day-item/text-disabled.description: Day number color for Disable state (out-of-month days).

--day-item/text-selected.description: Day number color for Selected state (inverted, on dark background).
